_meta.purpose: Baseline ns/iter for the perf_smoke_benchmarks suite. Used by scripts/check-perf-smoke.mjs to detect major (>=3x) regressions. NOT an authoritative performance record. See docs/performance/perf-smoke.md.
_meta.seeded_from: Rough scaling of docs/performance/benchmarks.md numbers to allow for ubuntu-latest CI being slower and noisier than the reference Apple Silicon run. Replace with real CI-measured values on first green run.
